name: oh-my-ontology-mcp
description: MCP server — humans and AI agents read/write the same codebase ontology vault. Current surface: 23 tools (15 read + 8 write).

scripts.test: node --test src/parser.test.mjs src/query.test.mjs src/validate.test.mjs src/vault.test.mjs src/redirect-backlinks.test.mjs src/conflict-detection.test.mjs src/analyze.test.mjs src/infer-imports.test.mjs src/omot-ignore.test.mjs src/ontology-compiler.test.mjs src/ontology-engine.test.mjs src/verify-script.test.mjs src/integration.test.mjs
